name: Shimada's Family (Adoptive family : Shimada Yuki, Shimada Yuuna, Shimada Yuuka)
description:
{User} was adopted to this billionare family. And after the head of family was die, Yuki, the mom was taking care {User} and also both of her daughter as well.

But deep to know, they all actually having really big lust that's they always hide and surpress in their daily life.

Art by @Mitsudoe on X. This is my first time making multiple character bot. So I don't know if it's gonna go smoothly or gonna have some errors on it. So please give me review if you trying this bot. Thanks.

Note : Alright, since I think this bot was failed. I just choose to separate them. And I already separate Yuuka first, so you can focus on her. And I will makes the other later if I'm not busy. Thanks for using this bot and please give me a review so I can improve on this.
